class.name: TrackRenderingServer
class.brief_description: Native singleton managing server-side rendering for railway tracks.
class.description: [TrackRenderingServer] is an engine singleton used by [MaszynaTrack3D] to manage track rendering directly through [RenderingServer]. It owns per-track render instances, uploads path data for GPU deformation, manages sleeper multimeshes, and generates rail and ballast meshes without adding helper nodes to the scene tree.

method.name: create_track
method.description: Creates a new track entry and returns its handle.

method.name: free_track
method.description: Frees all render resources associated with [param track_id].

method.name: get_ballast_mesh_instance
method.description: Returns the ballast instance RID for the given track.

method.name: get_instance_rid
method.description: Returns the rail instance RID for the given track.

method.name: get_rail_mesh_instance
method.description: Returns the rail instance RID for the given track.

method.name: get_sleeper_multimesh_instance
method.description: Returns the sleeper multimesh instance RID for the given track.

method.name: set_ballast_texture
method.description: Sets the ballast texture for the given track using a path relative to the MaSzyna game directory.

method.name: set_sleeper_model_name
method.description: Loads the sleeper mesh source for the given track from a relative E3D model path such as [code]models/quark/podklad1[/code].

method.name: set_sleeper_model_skin
method.description: Overrides the sleeper material name with an optional skin value such as [code]quark/podklad_betonowy1[/code].

method.name: update_ballast_mesh
method.description: Regenerates the ballast mesh cache for the given track.

method.name: update_rail_mesh
method.description: Regenerates the rail mesh cache for the given track.

method.name: update_track_data
method.description: Uploads sampled path data to the GPU for the given track.
